category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (KN95 / FFP-type mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Singapore market. Filtering respirators are NOT a Controlled Good under Singapore's consumer Safety Mark scheme — there is no mandatory pre-market respirator certification; workplace use is governed by the Workplace Safety and Health Act (MOM) plus the SS 548 code of practice, and medical masks are regulated separately by HSA.

target_market_label.zh: 新加坡（EMA / 企业发展局）
target_market_label.zht: 新加坡（EMA / 企業發展局）

title.en: China-to-Singapore PPE Respirator (KN95 Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入新加坡（KN95）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入新加坡（KN95）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against the Singapore market reality. Filtering respirators are NOT Controlled Goods under Enterprise Singapore's Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme — there is no mandatory pre-market respirator certification or SAFETY Mark for them. Occupational respiratory protection is governed by the Workplace Safety and Health Act (Ministry of Manpower) and the SS 548 code of practice; medical and surgical masks are regulated separately by the Health Sciences Authority (HSA). For a Chinese exporter the gap is mostly the absence of a mandatory mark plus reliance on buyer and workplace-safety expectations rather than a government certificate.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与新加坡市场实况对照。过滤式呼吸器并非企业发展局《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》项下的受管制货品——不存在针对呼吸器的强制上市前认证或安全标志（SAFETY Mark）。职业呼吸防护受《工作场所安全与健康法》（人力部）及SS 548实务守则规管；医用及外科口罩由卫生科学局（HSA）另行规管。对中国出口商而言，差距主要在于缺少强制性标志，以及依赖买家与工作场所安全的期望而非政府证书。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與新加坡市場實況對照。過濾式呼吸器並非企業發展局《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》項下的受管制貨品——不存在針對呼吸器的強制上市前認證或安全標誌（SAFETY Mark）。職業呼吸防護受《工作場所安全與健康法》（人力部）及SS 548實務守則規管；醫用及外科口罩由衛生科學局（HSA）另行規管。對中國出口商而言，差距主要在於缺少強制性標誌，以及依賴買家與工作場所安全的期望而非政府證書。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-laboratory assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. The statement that filtering respirators are not Controlled Goods reflects the current Singapore consumer-safety scheme and may change; medical-device and workplace-safety obligations still apply. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Singapore law, SS standards, MOM workplace-safety duties, and HSA medical-device rules with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可实验室评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。关于过滤式呼吸器不属受管制货品的说明反映新加坡现行消费者安全计划，可能变动；医疗器械及工作场所安全义务仍然适用。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行新加坡法律、SS标准、人力部工作场所安全责任及HSA医疗器械规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可實驗室評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。關於過濾式呼吸器不屬受管制貨品的說明反映新加坡現行消費者安全計劃，可能變動；醫療器械及工作場所安全義務仍然適用。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行新加坡法律、SS標準、人力部工作場所安全責任及HSA醫療器械規則。

answer_first.en: Filtering respirators (KN95 / FFP-type masks) are NOT Controlled Goods under Singapore's Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme, so there is no mandatory pre-market respirator certification and no SAFETY Mark for them. Singapore therefore has no government gate equivalent to EU CE marking for these masks. Instead, occupational use is governed by the Workplace Safety and Health Act (Ministry of Manpower) and the SS 548 code of practice for respiratory protection, while medical and surgical masks are regulated separately by HSA as medical devices. For a Chinese KN95 exporter the practical gap is not a missing certificate but the absence of a recognised mark plus the need to meet buyer and WSH expectations (e.g. SS 548 / equivalence to recognised classes).
answer_first.zh: 过滤式呼吸器（KN95 / FFP型口罩）并非新加坡《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》项下的受管制货品，因此不存在强制上市前呼吸器认证，也没有针对其的安全标志（SAFETY Mark）。新加坡对此类口罩没有等同于欧盟CE标志的政府准入门槛。职业使用受《工作场所安全与健康法》（人力部）及SS 548呼吸防护实务守则规管，医用及外科口罩则由HSA作为医疗器械另行规管。对中国KN95出口商而言，实际差距并非缺少证书，而是缺少受认可的标志，以及须满足买家与工作场所安全的期望（如SS 548／与受认可等级的等效）。
answer_first.zht: 過濾式呼吸器（KN95 / FFP型口罩）並非新加坡《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》項下的受管制貨品，因此不存在強制上市前呼吸器認證，也沒有針對其的安全標誌（SAFETY Mark）。新加坡對此類口罩沒有等同於歐盟CE標誌的政府准入門檻。職業使用受《工作場所安全與健康法》（人力部）及SS 548呼吸防護實務守則規管，醫用及外科口罩則由HSA作為醫療器械另行規管。對中國KN95出口商而言，實際差距並非缺少證書，而是缺少受認可的標誌，以及須滿足買家與工作場所安全的期望（如SS 548／與受認可等級的等效）。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Singapore Statutes Online (sso.agc.gov.sg), Enterprise Singapore, Ministry of Manpower (mom.gov.sg), and HSA (hsa.gov.sg) official URLs are the primary sources for Singapore law and standards. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
